overall.description: Static elevated shot of a dimly lit gothic interior room featuring a vintage CRT television displaying static, surrounded by atmospheric dust, warm lamplight, and stone archways. The scene appears to be from a video game with cinematic lighting and detailed textures.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic mansion interior room with vintage electronics

large blue carpet covering the foreground floor area
rough textured stone wall forming the room's back wall

segments.scene_description: Static overhead view of a gothic mansion room illuminated by warm wall sconces. A vintage CRT television displaying static sits on a wooden stand in the center, surrounded by atmospheric dust particles. Stone archways frame the background while a blue rug covers the foreground floor, with no movement or changes occurring throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, elevated perspective of a dimly lit gothic interior that remains frozen in a state of atmospheric stillness. It begins with a high-angle view of a mansion room where warm wall sconces cast a soft glow over stone archways and a blue rug. The camera lingers on a vintage CRT television displaying flickering static atop a wooden stand, while fine dust particles drift through the air. The scene persists in this singular, moody composition, preserving the heavy silence and cinematic lighting of the room without any shift in position or environment.
